title: BTC price bottom not due until Q4? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week

title: Chinese court treats Bitcoin as property in 107 BTC memory theft case
summary: Man in eastern China who stole 107 Bitcoin using a memorized seed phrase gets 10 years and nine months behind bars.

summary: Copper climbed, recouping some of last week’s losses, as Iranian media reported that the country has ended a military operation against Israel.

summary: US stock futures staged a rebound, bringing a rout in technology stocks to a halt even as flaring tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices higher.
